topic: A Mongolian horseman using an Uurga to catch a wild horse, wide landscape shot.

parsed_generation.script:
Scene 1 — Opening (0-2s): Wide landscape shot; side view of a lone Mongolian horseman with Uurga in hand, grasslands sweeping to the horizon.
Scene 2 — Approach (2-5s): Wide landscape; tracking shot from a low angle as the rider swings the Uurga in a high arc toward an off-frame wild horse; dust plumes rise behind.
Scene 3 — Capture (5-8s): Wide landscape; track/tilt as the Uurga loop tightens on the off-frame target; rider braces, rope taut, wind shaping the scene.
parsed_generation.narration: On the Mongolian steppe, mastery of the Uurga defines the chase. This sequence emphasizes timing, balance, and the quiet tension between rider and terrain. The expansive frame foregrounds the rider’s control against the vast, wind-swept plains.

feedback: The prompt stays true to the topic with a clear stepwise chase on a Mongolian horseman using an Uurga across a wide landscape. To tighten alignment with the reference style, ensure moments are clearly on-frame during key actions and provide more concrete camera directives (e.g., specific shot sizes at each beat). Consider a sharper resolution of the capture moment to emphasize the actual catch.
strengths: Clear, action-first sequence with defined scene beats.
Topic-specific details (Mongolian rider, Uurga, wide grassland) are well integrated.
fixes: Include at least one on-frame capture moment of the wild horse to enhance focal clarity.
